name: VR Wilderness Survival
short_description: You are trapped in a mine, and when night falls, wild animals will come to attack you. Use a machine gun to defend your camp.
detailed_description:
• This is a VR shooting game with a warm camp atmosphere.

  • At night, many wild animals come to the mine in search of food and will actively attack you. Therefore, you can only sleep and replenish ammunition during the day. Experience survival in the mine from a first-person perspective.

  • At night, you must conserve bullets—once you run out, you’ll become easy prey.

  • The longer you survive, the more animals will attack you, challenging your survival time.

  • The game features a development system: each day you survive, you accumulate gold coins that can be used to upgrade weapons.

  • Unlock new weapons and activate infrared auto-aim.

Device Requirements: A device that supports OpenXR is required.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
